channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #76: Angry Surgeon!
item.description:
What happens when you anger a brain surgeon?
They will give you a piece of your mind.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260518-1957.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:setup: What happens when you anger a brain surgeon?
item.dadjokefix:punchline: They will give you a piece of your mind.
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:
What happens when you anger a brain surgeon? They will give you a piece of your mind. 👇 rate it 1-10 in comments
🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjokes #dadjokefix #dadjoke #aigenerated #aiavatar #punsday #dadhumor #funnyvideos #foryoupage #surgeon #doctor #hospital
item.dadjokefix:instagram_caption:
What happens when you anger a brain surgeon?
They will give you a piece of your mind. 🫥
Drop a number 1-10 in comments — how bad was it?
Follow @dadjokefix for two dad jokes a day.
🤖 Hank is an AI character. Voice, face and animation are all generated. . . . #dadjokes #dadjokefix #dadjoke #aigenerated #aiavatar #punsday #dadhumor #funnyvideos #foryoupage #surgeon #doctor #hospital

What happens when you anger a brain surgeon?
They will give you a piece of your mind.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #75: Nosy Neighbors?
item.description:
What do you call two guys hanging out by your window?
Kurt & Rod.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260518-1650.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #74: A climber's kid got a rocky name!
item.description:
What did the mountain climber name his son?
Cliff.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260517-2308.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #73: What do bees do after they wed?
item.description:
What do bees do after they are married?
They go on a honeymoon.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260517-1921.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #72: Money in the Freezer?!
item.description:
Why did the man put his money in the freezer?
He wanted cold hard cash!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #70: No Space at the Library!

They were completely booked.

item.title: Joke Court Friday #68: African vs. Indian Elephant?
item.description:
What’s the difference between an African elephant and an Indian elephant?
About 5000 miles.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Joke Court Friday #67: A Puzzling Interruption!
item.description:
Don’t interrupt someone working intently on a puzzle.
Chances are, you’ll hear some crosswords.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260515-1949.mp4

item.title: Joke Court Friday #66: Never buy THIS!
item.description:

It's a total rip-off.

item.title: Throwback Thursday #65: A Wookiee's Favorite Treat?
item.description:

It's chewy!

item.title: Throwback Thursday #64: A Noodle… That's a LIAR?!
item.description:
What do you call a fake noodle?
An impasta.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260514-1958.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #61: Can I Watch TV?
item.description:
Can I watch the TV?
Dad: Yes, but don’t turn it on.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #60: Eye Can't Believe This!
item.description:

1 or 2? 1... or 2?

They always egg-cercise!

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #58: My Computer FROZE!
item.description:
It was so cold yesterday my computer froze.
My own fault though, I left too many windows open.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260512-2005.mp4
